sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Discount Retailer Stocks Q4 Teardown: TJX (NYSE:TJX) Vs The Rest
feed.summary: This article analyzes the Q4 performance of several discount retailers, highlighting TJX (NYSE:TJX) alongside peers like Five Below (NASDAQ:FIVE), Ollie's (NASDAQ:OLLI), Burlington (NYSE:BURL), and Ross Stores (NASDAQ:ROST). While the group generally reported satisfactory Q4 results, Five Below showed the fastest revenue growth, and Ross Stores had the biggest analyst estimates beat. TJX delivered slower revenue growth but still reported strong annual performance.
